base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_kraid_attack — a character (boss) from 1986 metroid. Kraid — giant green toad-like boss of Kraid's Lair. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Kraid — giant green toad-like boss of Kraid's Lair; 2-frame body-flex + spike-projectile attack from belly
